name: AGREE REALTY CORP
summary: Agree Realty Corporation is a fully integrated REIT focused on the ownership, acquisition, development, and management of retail properties net leased to industry-leading tenants. Founded in 1971 and NYSE-listed since 1994, the Company operates a portfolio of 2,674 properties across all 50 states totaling approximately 55.5 million square feet of GLA. Approximately 66.8% of annualized base rent derives from investment-grade-rated tenants. Substantially all tenants operate under net lease agreements.

products.name: Net Leased Retail Properties
products.description: Ownership, acquisition, development, and management of retail properties net leased to national tenants across all 50 states.

products.name: Commercial Paper Program
products.description: Short-term, fixed rate, unsecured commercial paper notes with maturities up to 397 days, totaling up to $625 million.

products.name: ATM Equity Program
products.description: At-the-market common stock offering program allowing share sales and forward sale agreements to raise equity capital.
